content.en:
When Ye Tian's will returned to awaken, Doomsday Supreme Venerable sensed Ye Tian's awakening breath and came through the void for the first time.

Ye Tian also sensed the aura of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable and the Shadow Sand Extremity, and both of them came.

And at this moment, Ye Tian also sensed the general realm of the two ultimate supreme supremes of Doom and Shadow Sand.

The Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable was the top Ultimate Extreme Venerable, comparable to the top Ancient Demon Level, while the Doomsday Extreme Venerable was the pinnacle Ultimate Extreme Venerable, which surprised him a little.

In his previous cognition, the Doomsday Extreme Venerable should also be the top Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and it seems that the Doomsday Extreme Venerable's hidden strength gave him a wrong perception.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Dharma Venerables on their return from the past time and space. "

Doomsday Extreme, Shadow Sand Extreme Honor, congratulated.

They all knew that Ye Tian's strength should improve by leaps and bounds in the coming years.

However, they didn't know how much Ye Tian had gained in the past time and space.

"Doomsday Extreme, Shadow Sand Extreme, you actually know that I have been to the past time and space, could it be that you have also been to 12?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Hmm!" Doomsday Extreme Venerable nodded, "I've been to the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, but it's a pity that the racial body talent we occupy is average, just relying on the experience of becoming the ultimate Extreme Venerable all the way to cultivation, my final achievement is only a top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, and I died in a war, and the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable's achievements in the past time and space are even lower, just ordinary Ancient Demon level, but we have all gained many benefits, and after returning, our strength has improved a lot, and we have comprehended countless years, which is why we have today's strength." "

Immediately, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable asked curiously, "Unable to Extreme Venerable, what strength have you improved to in the past time and space?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, but still said: "Ultimate Ancient Demon!"

He originally wanted to hide it, but these two Ultimate Masters told the truth, and he didn't treat these two as friends anymore.

"What, the Ultimate Ancient Demon!"

The Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable and the Doomsday Extreme Venerable were shocked, and immediately said with envy: "Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, you are so lucky that you were able to break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon in that era, I am afraid that your strength will increase by leaps and bounds in the future." As far as I know, even in that era, it was extremely difficult to become the ultimate ancient demon, and among the large number of ancient demon-level powerhouses in a main department, there were only a few ultimate ancient demons!"

"It's just a matter of luck. "

Ye Tian said modestly.

If he reveals his true gains, Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable will be scared stupid.

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, in the era of ancient demons, there are so many ancient demon powerhouses, why is it so difficult to become the ultimate ultimate supreme in this era?"

Ye Tian asked.

Doomsday Supreme Venerable frowned and said, "I have studied countless years, and finally have a guess, maybe this guess may not be accurate. The era of the ancient demons has countless resources, and the heaven and earth are filled with the breath of space-time particles, and our space-time resources are poor, and there are no space-time particles between heaven and earth, resulting in an extremely low probability of impacting the ultimate supreme. Moreover, the inheritance has been severed, heaven and earth are no longer suitable for cultivation, and the bloodline of living beings is far inferior to that of the living beings of that era. The reason why our era has become like this is that I think there was a certain problem in the era of the ancient demons, such as the collapse of heaven and earth, which caused the origin of heaven and earth to be damaged, causing this era to be so weak. "

"Do you know what will happen in the end?"

Ye Tian asked.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable shook their heads one after another, they didn't know what the Final Tribulation was, after all, they weren't even the Ultimate Ancient Demon in the past time and space, how could they have the opportunity to come into contact with the secret of the Final Tribulation!

Immediately, Ye Tian said the final tribulation, and also said the space-time level ultimate ancient demon realm above the ultimate ancient demon.

After hearing this, Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable's faces changed drastically.

"Could it be that the final realm has passed, and that's why this era is so weak?"

Doomsday Supreme said.

Ye Tiandao: "I don't know, unless I break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm in this era, and then take the time to deduce the final tribulation, I will know if it has passed." Now, let me deduce, but I can't deduce any traces. "

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, then you need to break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm as soon as possible, and then deduce it again. "Doomsday is extremely respectful.

Of course, they also knew that in this era, it was very difficult to break through to the ultimate supreme realm, and it would take a lot of resources and time, and what was lacking in this era was resources.

After that, Ye Tian chatted with Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable for a while, and then separated.

......

"Retreat first to condense the copy talent orb!"

Ye Tian decided.

In this era, there is definitely no treasure that can allow him to transform his copy talent, so he can only condense the copy talent ball by himself and make the copy talent advanced.

Immediately.

The copy talent imprint in his soul began to disintegrate under Ye Tian's control, turning into countless particles, and then began to continuously combine into a copy talent ball.

However, copying talent balls is extremely complex, and hundreds of millions of combinations are superimposed on top of each other, layer upon layer, which is also time-consuming.

Time flies.

A long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Copying Talent Imprint began to usher in the final transformation.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian understood the reason, he was transforming 513 on his own, without the help of any treasures, those treasures made the replication talent transform, and also had the effect of relieving pain.

However, Ye Tian still forcibly held back.

After a long time, the replication talent finally succeeded in metamorphosing.

"It's done, the copy talent has transformed into a copy talent ball, and you can copy the copy body of the ultimate supreme cultivation. "

Ye Tian's mind moved, and a copy body gradually condensed.

Afterwards.

He began to arrange a large array in the territory of the Terran to block the perception of other Ultimate Extreme Venerables, so that the Doomsday Extreme Venerable and the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable could not spy on a trace of the Terrans.

It's not that he's guarding against those ultimate supremes, it's just that he wants to keep a secret, and he doesn't want to be easily snooped on.

"The next thing is to improve my life pattern, so that the life pattern can reach the level of the extreme life pattern, in that case, my strength will skyrocket!"

Immediately, he began to use countless resources to complete the transformation of his life pattern.

And this step will be very slow, if it is in the ancient demon era, it will be easy, because that era is full of countless space-time particles, it is easy to complete the transformation, but in this era, there is nothing, and there are no resources.

He can only take his time to transform, transforming from a little cell in his body, so that the whole body can complete the transformation.
